title: nonyrauwu's Trailer
description: Vanilla-first mindset — but like you’re actually in the trailer.
body:
![1.21.5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/170b20d6e74e5689c19debcc514512f3d87a0b91_0.webp)

## Design Philosophy
This pack isn’t about adding more — it’s about making it _feel_ like you’re really inside one of Mojang’s official trailers. Immersive, vanilla-friendly, and fair. Every mod and visual tweak is chosen with care: no minimaps, no free zoom (outside the spyglass), no clutter. Just the kind of logic that would make sense if trailers were playable.

## Gameplay and Features  

Small changes that gently extend vanilla. All tuned to support that "lived-in" trailer feeling.

If you want to stay full vanilla, you still can disable the mod manually or deeply customized through mod menu settings - it will be indicated (configurable).

- **Easy Anvils** / **Easy Magic** — small visual and QoL improvements for anvils and enchantment tables.
- **Horse Expert** — adds a monocle to inspect horse stats, even untamed.
- **Unlit Campfire** — campfires are now placed unlit; rest behaves like vanilla (configurable).

### Notable Features
  
- **Crawl** — ability to crawl anytime, press a custom key (bind manually).
- **Sit Anywhere** — sit on any block by looking down, sneak-tapping, then right-clicking.
- **Spyglass Improvements** — quick spyglass access via hotkey, improved usage like zoom (configurable).
- **SleepWarp** — time passes smoothly during sleep instead of skipping (configurable).
- **Do a Barrel Roll** — semi-realistic elytra flight. ["i" to disable]   

...and more subtle, trailer-style touches — too small to list, but they add up.

## Compatibility Notes
- **Hold My Items** x **First-person Model** — I've tried tweaking them so they look well together, but still the arms may look short, and the character may appear one-handed without a chestpiece; all the settings have been adjusted to default FOV (configurable) ["F6" to disable First-person].
- **Distant Horizons** x **Nostalgia Shader** — not compatible.
- **Foggy Pale Garden (FPG)** x **Iris Shaders** — not compatible.

## Resource Packs

These packs are chosen to match the look and atmosphere of Mojang's official trailers — based on their screenshots, promo materials, and overall direction. Most are enabled by default for convenience, but you’re free to adjust as needed.

### **Core Style (Enabled by Default)**  

These form the base look:

- **Bare Bones** or **Trailers Vision (default)** — Trailers Vision is sharper and closer to the trailers, Bare Bones is the classic.  
- **Fresh Animations** + **Fresh Moves**  
    _Use **Bare Bones x Fresh Animations** patch for compatibility._  
    _I recommend using Bare Bones skins with Fresh Moves *eyes* support._  
    _Don’t want to edit skins? You can use this BB Steve with animated eyes [>namemc<](https://namemc.com/skin/4cf86850820fa754)_   
- **Theone’s Eating Animation** — not seen in trailers, but fits naturally and improves immersion.  
  _**Bare Bones x Eating Animation** patch for compatibility._
- **Bare Bones Moon Fix** — adjusts the moon to look more trailer-like.
- **Axolotl Buckets** — not seen in trailers, but fits into the vanilla logic.
- **Bare Bones Armor Trim Item Fix** and **Armor Trim Preview** - encourages playing with trims, as seen in trailers!
- **Recolourful Containers** — personal preference; close to trailer style/logic.
- **Bare Bones Bossbars** — minimal boss health bars that feel at home in Mojang’s style (not directly shown, but consistent with aesthetic).

### **Optional Picks (Disabled by Default)**  

Additional visuals not seen in trailers, but might be your taste:

- **Better Leaves** - Transparent Leaves. 
- **3D Mace**, **3D Bundles**, **3D Arrows** _(was in trailers before)_, **3D Buckets**  
- **Bare Bones Simple PBR** _(Trailers Vision not compatible)_  
- **Simple CTM**, **Connected Glass**, **Emissive Ores**, **Low On Fire**  

*All compatibility patches are already included in the pack — just enable them as needed.*

## From Author
[Inundated](https://modrinth.com/mod/inundated) - Completely floods worlds with water, a chunk generation injection mod.

Leave feedback or report problems about this pack on [GitHub](https://github.com/nonyrauwu/nonyrauwus-trailer/discussions)  

Your yet another Trailer Style modpack.

## Enjoy.
